description_long: This ottoman features a cylindrical cushion upholstered in a faux fur material with a white and gray marbled pattern, giving it a soft and luxurious appearance. The cushion is supported by three sturdy legs, two of which are made of dark wood and one of a lighter wood, creating a visually interesting contrast. The legs are straight and angular, extending slightly outward for stability and a modern aesthetic. The top surface of the ottoman is flat and plush, ideal for sitting or resting items. There is no visible tufting or decorative trim, emphasizing a clean and contemporary design. The overall construction suggests comfort and style, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A cylindrical ottoman with a white and gray faux fur cushion and three contrasting wooden legs, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The ottoman is seen from the back, highlighting the cylindrical faux fur cushion and the two dark wooden legs on either side.
description_view_1: The front view shows the plush faux fur cushion and the central light wood leg, flanked by the two dark wooden legs.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the marbled faux fur texture and the symmetrical arrangement of the three legs.
description_view_3: The ottoman is shown from another rear angle, again displaying the cylindrical shape and the combination of light and dark wooden legs.
